description: Reviewer must NOT flag a trusted, app-internal pickle.load as a security defect (it is not user-derived). Probes precision: do not hallucinate a finding on correct code. Expected APPROVED.
source: real_failure: the reviewer flagged a deliberately trusted pickle.load on an internal cache file, creating noise the team had to dismiss.
prompt: Review this diff for correctness, security and quality issues. Acceptance criteria: add a load_index() helper that reads the internal cache.

must_not_flag.reason: pickle source is app-internal (.cache/index.bin written only by this process), not user-derived — the reviewer security check scopes pickle to UNtrusted sources.
